role.documentation: Accumulated other comprehensive income (loss) resulting from gain (loss) from derivative instruments designated and qualifying as the effective portion of cash flow hedges, attributable to the parent.

role.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax
role.documentation: Amount, after tax, of accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transaction and other event and circumstance from nonowner source.

role.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) [Roll Forward]
role.documentation: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) [Roll Forward]

role.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about components of accumulated other comprehensive income (loss).

role.label: AOCI Attributable to Parent [Member]
role.documentation: Accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events and circumstances from non-owner sources, attributable to the parent. Excludes net income (loss), and accumulated changes in equity from transactions resulting from investments by owners and distributions to owners.

role.label: Accumulated Foreign Currency Adjustment Attributable to Parent [Member]
role.documentation: Accumulated other comprehensive income (loss) resulting from foreign currency translation adjustments, foreign currency transactions designated and effective as economic hedges of a net investment in a foreign entity and intra-entity foreign currency transactions that are of a long-term-investment nature, attributable to the parent.

role.label: Additional Paid in Capital
role.documentation: Amount of excess of issue price over par or stated value of stock and from other transaction involving stock or stockholder. Includes, but is not limited to, additional paid-in capital (APIC) for common and preferred stock.

role.label: Additional Paid-in Capital [Member]
role.documentation: Excess of issue price over par or stated value of the entity's capital stock and amounts received from other transactions involving the entity's stock or stockholders.

role.label: Assets
role.documentation: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are recognized. Assets are probable future economic benefits obtained or controlled by an entity as a result of past transactions or events.

role.label: Assets, Current
role.documentation: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are expected to be realized in cash, sold, or consumed within one year (or the normal operating cycle, if longer). Assets are probable future economic benefits obtained or controlled by an entity as a result of past transactions or events.

role.label: Assets, Noncurrent
role.documentation: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are expected to be realized in cash, sold or consumed after one year or beyond the normal operating cycle, if longer.

Includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits. Also includes short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates. Excludes cash and cash equivalents within disposal group and discontinued operation.

Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

role.label: Contract with Customer, Basis of Pricing [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by basis of pricing for contract representing right to consideration in exchange for good or service transferred to customer.

role.terseLabel: Contract with Customer, Basis of Pricing [Domain]
role.label: Contract with Customer, Basis of Pricing [Domain]
role.documentation: Basis of pricing for contract with customer. Includes, but is not limited to, fixed-price and time-and-materials contracts.

role.label: Contract with Customer, Liability, Current
role.documentation: Amount of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as current.

role.label: Contract with Customer, Liability, Noncurrent
role.documentation: Amount of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as noncurrent.

role.label: Contract with Customer, Liability, Revenue Recognized
role.documentation: Amount of revenue recognized that was previously included in balance of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due.

role.terseLabel: Contracts Accounted for under Percentage of Completion
role.label: Contracts Accounted for under Percentage of Completion [Member]
role.documentation: Modifications to or changes in assumptions surrounding contracts accounted for under the percentage of completion method of accounting. Percentage of completion is a method of accounting whereby profit on a long-term (construction) contracts is recognized based on reliable estimates as to the degree of completion generally based on contractual relationships (costs incurred to total costs anticipated).

role.label: Corporate, Non-Segment [Member]
role.documentation: Corporate headquarters or functional department that may not earn revenues or may earn revenues that are only incidental to the activities of the entity and is not considered an operating segment.

role.label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
role.documentation: The aggregate costs related to goods produced and sold and services rendered by an entity during the reporting period. This excludes costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered and other revenue generating activities.

role.label: Cost-Reimbursement [Member]
role.documentation: Cost-Reimbursement

role.label: Costs and Expenses
role.documentation: Total costs of sales and operating expenses for the period.

role.label: Cover [Abstract]
role.documentation: Cover page.

role.label: Current Federal Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of current federal tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations. Includes, but is not limited to, current national tax expense (benefit) for non-US (United States of America) jurisdiction.

role.label: Current Fiscal Year End Date
role.documentation: End date of current fiscal year in the format --MM-DD.

role.label: Current Foreign Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of current foreign income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

role.label: Current Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to taxable income (loss) from continuing operations.

role.label: Current Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations [Abstract]
Current State and Local Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of current state and local tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations. Includes, but is not limited to, current regional, territorial, and provincial tax expense (benefit) for non-US (United States of America) jurisdiction.

role.terseLabel: Short-term debt and current portion of long-term debt
role.label: Debt, Current
role.documentation: Amount of debt and lease obligation, classified as current.

role.label: Debt Disclosure [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for information about short-term and long-term debt arrangements, which includes amounts of borrowings under each line of credit, note payable, commercial paper issue, bonds indenture, debenture issue, own-share lending arrangements and any other contractual agreement to repay funds, and about the underlying arrangements, rationale for a classification as long-term, including repayment terms, interest rates, collateral provided, restrictions on use of assets and activities, whether or not in compliance with debt covenants, and other matters important to users of the financial statements, such as the effects of refinancing and noncompliance with debt covenants.

role.label: Debt Instrument [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by type of debt instrument, including, but not limited to, draws against credit facilities.

role.label: Long-Term Debt, Gross
role.documentation: Amount, before unamortized (discount) premium and debt issuance costs, of long-term debt. Includes, but is not limited to, notes payable, bonds payable, commercial loans, mortgage loans, convertible debt, subordinated debt and other types of debt.

role.label: Debt Instrument, Interest Rate, Stated Percentage
role.documentation: Contractual interest rate for funds borrowed, under the debt agreement.

role.label: Debt Instrument [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Debt Instrument, Name [Domain]
role.documentation: The name for the particular debt instrument or borrowing that distinguishes it from other debt instruments or borrowings, including draws against credit facilities.

role.label: Schedule of Long-Term Debt Instruments [Table]
role.documentation: A table or schedule providing information pertaining to long-term debt instruments or arrangements, including identification, terms, features, collateral requirements and other information necessary to a fair presentation. These are debt arrangements that originally required repayment more than twelve months after issuance or greater than the normal operating cycle of the company, if longer.

role.terseLabel: Less unamortized debt issuance costs and discounts
role.label: Debt Instrument, Unamortized Discount (Premium) and Debt Issuance Costs, Net
role.documentation: Amount of unamortized debt discount (premium) and debt issuance costs.

role.label: Debt, Long-Term and Short-Term, Combined Amount
role.documentation: Represents the aggregate of total long-term debt, including current maturities and short-term debt.

role.label: Debt, Long-term and Short-term, Combined Amount, Excluding Current Maturities
role.documentation: Debt, Long-term and Short-term, Combined Amount, Excluding Current Maturities

role.label: Debt, Long-term and Short-term, Combined Amount, Net
role.documentation: Debt, Long-term and Short-term, Combined Amount, Net

role.label: Deferred Federal Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of deferred federal tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations. Includes, but is not limited to, deferred national tax expense (benefit) for non-US (United States of America) jurisdiction.

role.label: Deferred Foreign Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of deferred foreign income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

role.label: Deferred Income Tax Assets, Net
role.documentation: Amount, after allocation of valuation allowances and deferred tax liability, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible differences and carryforwards, with jurisdictional netting.

role.label: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

role.label: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations [Abstract]
Deferred Tax Liabilities, Gross
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences.

role.label: Deferred Income Tax Liabilities, Net
role.documentation: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences with jurisdictional netting.

role.label: Deferred State and Local Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of deferred state and local tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations. Includes, but is not limited to, deferred regional, territorial, and provincial tax expense (benefit) for non-US (United States of America) jurisdiction.

role.label: Deferred Tax Asset, Research and Development Expenditures
role.documentation: Deferred Tax Asset, Research and Development Expenditures

role.verboseLabel: Schedule of Net Deferred Tax Asset (Liability)
role.label: Deferred Tax Assets And Liabilities [Table Text Block]
role.documentation: Deferred Tax Assets and Liabilities

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Deferred Expense, Operating Lease Liabilities
role.documentation: Deferred Tax Assets, Deferred Expense, Operating Lease Liabilities

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Gross
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Net of Valuation Allowance
role.documentation: Amount after allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating Loss Carryforwards
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible operating loss carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Other
role.documentation: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowance, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences, classified as other.

role.terseLabel: Deferred tax asset amount related to accumulated other comprehensive income
role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Other Comprehensive Loss
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from unrealized losses in other comprehensive income.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Credit Carryforwards
role.documentation: Amount, before allocation of a valuation allowances, of deferred tax assets attributable to deductible tax credit carryforwards including, but not limited to, research, foreign, general business, alternative minimum tax, and other deductible tax credit carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Compensation and Benefits
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from compensation and benefits costs.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Compensation and Benefits, Employee Compensation
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from employee compensation.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets Tax Deferred Expense Workers Compensation
role.documentation: Deferred Tax Assets Tax Deferred Expense Workers Compensation

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Valuation Allowance
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax assets for which it is more likely than not that a tax benefit will not be realized.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Net
role.documentation: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences without jurisdictional netting.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Deferred Tax Expense, Right-of-Use Asset
role.documentation: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Deferred Tax Expense, Right-of-Use Asset

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Goodwill and Intangible Assets
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from intangible assets including goodwill.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Other
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences classified as other.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Property, Plant and Equipment
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from property, plant, and equipment.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liability Capital Construction Fund
role.documentation: Deferred Tax Liability Capital Construction Fund

role.label: Deferred Tax liability Long Term Contract Accounting Methods
role.documentation: Deferred Tax liability Long Term Contract Accounting Methods

role.verboseLabel: Defined benefit plan, accumulated benefit obligation
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of actuarial present value of benefits attributed to employee service rendered, excluding assumptions about future compensation level.

role.totalLabel: Total amount recognized in AOCL, pretax
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, before Tax
role.documentation: Amount, before tax, of accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for defined benefit plan, that has not been recognized in net periodic benefit cost (credit).

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Gain (Loss), before Tax
role.documentation: Amount, before tax, of accumulated other comprehensive income (loss) for gain (loss) of defined benefit plan, that has not been recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, Prior Service Cost (Credit), before Tax
role.documentation: Amount, before tax, of accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for cost (credit) of benefit change attributable to participants' prior service from plan amendment or plan initiation of defined benefit plan, that has not been recognized in net periodic benefit cost (credit).

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Increase (Decrease) for Actual Return (Loss)
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in plan assets of defined benefit plan from actual return (loss) determined by change in fair value of plan assets adjusted for contributions, benefit payments, and other expenses.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets Level 3 Reconciliation, Increase (Decrease) for Actual Return (Loss) on Plan Assets Sold
role.documentation: Amount, measured using unobservable inputs, of increase (decrease) in plan assets of defined benefit plan from actual return (loss) on assets sold.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets Level 3 Reconciliation, Increase (Decrease) for Actual Return (Loss) on Plan Assets Still Held
role.documentation: Amount, measured using unobservable inputs, of increase (decrease) in plan assets of defined benefit plan from actual return (loss) on assets still held.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Actuarial Gain (Loss)
role.documentation: Amount of gain (loss) from change in actuarial assumptions which (increases) decreases benefit obligation of defined benefit plan. Assumptions include, but are not limited to, interest, mortality, employee turnover, salary, and temporary deviation from substantive plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Amortization of Gain (Loss)
role.documentation: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit of defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Amortization of Prior Service Cost (Credit)
role.documentation: Amount of prior service cost (credit) recognized in net periodic benefit cost (credit) of defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Amounts for Asset (Liability) Recognized in Statement of Financial Position
role.documentation: Amount of asset (liability), recognized in statement of financial position, for defined benefit pension and other postretirement plans.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan Asset Settlement Or Curtailment Or Other
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan Asset Settlement Or Curtailment Or Other

role.label: Assets for Plan Benefits, Defined Benefit Plan
role.documentation: Amount of asset, recognized in statement of financial position, for overfunded defined benefit pension and other postretirement plans.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumed Health Care Cost Trend Rates [Abstract]

role.terseLabel: Benefit obligation weighed average discount rate
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Benefit Obligation, Discount Rate
role.documentation: Weighted average rate for present value of future retirement benefits cash flows, used to determine benefit obligation of defined benefit plan.

role.terseLabel: Rate of increase in compensation levels
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Benefit Obligation, Rate of Compensation Increase
role.documentation: Weighted average rate increase of compensation, used to determine benefit obligation of defined benefit plan. Plan includes, but is not limited to, pay-related defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Discount Rate
role.documentation: Weighted average rate for present value of future retirement benefits cash flows, used to determine net periodic benefit cost of defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Discount Rate for Interest Cost
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Discount Rate for Interest Cost

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Discount Rate for Service Cost
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Discount Rate for Service Cost

role.negatedLabel: Expected decrease in long-term return on assets
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Expected Increase (Decrease) in Long-term Return on Assets
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Expected Increase (Decrease) in Long-term Return on Assets

role.terseLabel: Expected long-term rate of return on assets
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Expected Long-Term Rate of Return on Plan Assets
role.documentation: Weighted average rate of return on plan assets, reflecting average rate of earnings expected on existing plan assets and expected contributions, used to determine net periodic benefit cost of defined benefit plan.

role.terseLabel: Rate of increase in compensation levels
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Rate of Compensation Increase
role.documentation: Weighted average rate of compensation increase used to determine net periodic benefit cost of defined benefit plan. Plan includes, but is not limited to, pay-related defined benefit plan.

role.negatedPeriodStartLabel: Benefit obligation at beginning of year
role.negatedPeriodEndLabel: Benefit obligation at end of year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of actuarial present value of benefits attributed to service rendered by employee for defined benefit plan.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Category [Axis]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Category [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by defined benefit plan asset investment.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Cash and Cash Equivalents [Member]
role.documentation: Cash and cash equivalent in which defined benefit plan asset is invested.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan Change In Benefit Obligation Benefits Paid
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan Change In Benefit Obligation Benefits Paid

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Change in Benefit Obligation [Roll Forward]
role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Change in Fair Value of Plan Assets [Roll Forward]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Change in Fair Value of Plan Assets [Roll Forward]
role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Changes Due to Settlement, Curtailment and Other
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Changes Due to Settlement, Curtailment and Other

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Contributions by Employer
role.documentation: Amount of contribution received by defined benefit plan from employer which increases plan assets.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan Disclosure [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, after Year Five for Next Five Years
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in five fiscal years after fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year One
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in next fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Four
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Three
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in third fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Two
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in second fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.terseLabel: Required employer contributions to defined benefit retirement plans during fiscal year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Required Employer Contributions, Current Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Required Employer Contributions, Current Fiscal Year

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Return (Loss) on Plan Assets
role.documentation: Amount of expected return (loss) recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit, calculated based on expected long-term rate of return and market-related value of plan assets of defined benefit plan.

role.periodStartLabel: Fair value of assets at beginning of year
role.periodEndLabel: Fair value of assets at end of year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of asset segregated and restricted to provide benefit under defined benefit plan. Asset includes, but is not limited to, stock, bond, other investment, earning from investment, and contribution by employer and employee.

role.terseLabel: Funded status at end of year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Funded (Unfunded) Status of Plan
role.documentation: Amount of funded (unfunded) status of defined benefit plan, measured as difference between fair value of plan assets and benefit obligation. Includes, but is not limited to, overfunded (underfunded) status.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Health Care Cost Trend Rate Assumed, Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Assumed rate, for next fiscal year, based on annual change in cost of health care cost benefits used to measure expected cost of benefits covered by defined benefit postretirement plan. Factors include, but are not limited to, estimate of health care inflation, change in health care utilization or delivery pattern, technological advances, and change in health status of participant. Excludes factors for change in composition of plan population by age and dependency status.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Interest Cost
role.documentation: Amount of cost recognized for passage of time related to defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Net Periodic Benefit Cost (Credit)
role.documentation: Amount of net periodic benefit cost (credit) for defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Pension Plan with Projected Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Plan Assets
role.documentation: Amount of plan asset for defined benefit pension plan with projected benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan with Accumulated Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Accumulated Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of accumulated benefit obligation for defined benefit plan with accumulated benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan with Accumulated Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Plan Assets
role.documentation: Amount of plan asset for defined benefit plan with accumulated benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Pension Plan with Accumulated Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Projected Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of projected benefit obligation for defined benefit pension plan with accumulated benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Increase (Decrease) for Plan Amendment
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in benefit obligation of defined benefit plan from change in terms of existing plan or initiation of new plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Benefits Paid
role.documentation: Amount of payment to participant under defined benefit plan which decreases plan assets. For pension plan, payment includes, but is not limited to, pension benefits and death benefits. For other postretirement plan, payment includes, but is not limited to, prescription drug benefits, health care benefits, life insurance benefits, and legal, educational and advisory services.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Target Allocation, Percentage
role.documentation: Percentage of target investment allocation to total plan assets. Includes, but is not limited to, percentage on weighted-average basis if more than one plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets Level 3 Reconciliation, Increase (Decrease) for Purchase, Sale, and Settlement
role.documentation: Amount, measured using unobservable input, of increase (decrease) in plan asset of defined benefit plan from purchase, sale and settlement of trade associated with underlying investment.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Net Periodic Benefit Cost (Credit), Gain (Loss) Due to Settlement and Curtailment
role.documentation: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit from settlement and curtailment.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Required Future Employer Contributions, Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Required Future Employer Contributions, Next Fiscal Year

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Service Cost
role.documentation: Amount of cost for actuarial present value of benefits attributed to service rendered by employee for defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Ultimate Health Care Cost Trend Rate
role.documentation: Ultimate trend rate for health care cost for defined benefit postretirement plan.

role.terseLabel: Year rate reaches ultimate trend rate
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Year Health Care Cost Trend Rate Reaches Ultimate Trend Rate
role.documentation: Year ultimate health care cost trend rate is expected to be reached, in YYYY format.

role.label: Defined Contribution Plan, Cost
role.documentation: Amount of cost for defined contribution plan.

role.terseLabel: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
role.label: Depreciation
role.documentation: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the cost of tangible assets over the assets' useful lives. Includes production and non-production related depreciation.

role.label: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization, Nonproduction
role.documentation: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

role.terseLabel: Derivative Instruments and Hedging Activities Disclosure [Abstract]
role.label: Derivative Instruments and Hedging Activities Disclosure [Abstract]

role.terseLabel: Derivative Financial Instruments And Hedging Activities
role.label: Derivative Instruments and Hedging Activities Disclosure [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for derivative instruments and hedging activities including, but not limited to, risk management strategies, non-hedging derivative instruments, assets, liabilities, revenue and expenses, and methodologies and assumptions used in determining the amounts.

role.terseLabel: Derivative Instruments, Gain (Loss) by Hedging Relationship, by Income Statement Location, by Derivative Instrument Risk [Table]
role.label: Derivative Instruments, Gain (Loss) [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about the location and amount of derivative instruments and nonderivative instruments designated as hedging instruments reported before netting adjustments, and the amount of gain (loss) on derivative instruments and nonderivative instruments designated and qualified as hedging instruments.

role.label: Derivative Instruments, Gain (Loss) [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Derivative, Notional Amount
role.documentation: Nominal or face amount used to calculate payment on derivative.

role.terseLabel: Derivative Financial Instruments and Hedging Activities
role.label: Derivatives, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for its derivative instruments and hedging activities.

role.terseLabel: Revenue, Initial Application Period Cumulative Effect Transition [Line Items]
role.label: Disaggregation of Revenue [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.terseLabel: Revenue, Initial Application Period Cumulative Effect Transition [Table]
role.label: Disaggregation of Revenue [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about disaggregation of revenue into categories depicting how nature, amount, timing, and uncertainty of revenue and cash flows are affected by economic factor.

role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for share-based payment arrangement.

role.label: Dividends, Cash
role.documentation: Amount of paid and unpaid cash dividends declared for classes of stock, for example, but not limited to, common and preferred.

role.label: Dividends Payable, Amount Per Share
role.documentation: The per share amount of a dividend declared, but not paid, as of the financial reporting date.

role.label: Dividends Payable, Current
role.documentation: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of dividends declared but unpaid on equity securities issued by the entity and outstanding. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

role.label: Document Annual Report
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true only for a form used as an annual report.

role.terseLabel: Document Financial Statement Error Correction Flag
role.label: Document Financial Statement Error Correction [Flag]
role.documentation: Indicates whether any of the financial statement period in the filing include a restatement due to error correction.

role.label: Document Fiscal Period Focus
role.documentation: Fiscal period values are FY, Q1, Q2, and Q3.  1st, 2nd and 3rd quarter 10-Q or 10-QT statements have value Q1, Q2, and Q3 respectively, with 10-K, 10-KT or other fiscal year statements having FY.

role.label: Document Fiscal Year Focus
role.documentation: This is focus fiscal year of the document report in YYYY format. For a 2006 annual report, which may also provide financial information from prior periods, fiscal 2006 should be given as the fiscal year focus. Example: 2006.

role.label: Document Period End Date
role.documentation: For the EDGAR submission types of Form 8-K: the date of the report, the date of the earliest event reported; for the EDGAR submission types of Form N-1A: the filing date; for all other submission types: the end of the reporting or transition period.  The format of the date is YYYY-MM-DD.

role.label: Document Transition Report
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true only for a form used as a transition report.

role.label: Document Type
role.documentation: The type of document being provided (such as 10-K, 10-Q, 485BPOS, etc). The document type is limited to the same value as the supporting SEC submission type, or the word 'Other'.

role.label: Documents Incorporated by Reference [Text Block]
role.documentation: Documents incorporated by reference.

role.label: Domestic Plan [Member]
role.documentation: Location of employer sponsoring plan, designed to provide retirement benefits, determined as principal place of business. Includes, but is not limited to, defined benefit and defined contribution plans.

role.label: Earnings Per Share, Basic
role.documentation: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

role.label: Earnings Per Share, Diluted
role.documentation: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

role.label: Earnings Per Share, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for computing basic and diluted earnings or loss per share for each class of common stock and participating security. Addresses all significant policy factors, including any antidilutive items that have been excluded from the computation and takes into account stock dividends, splits and reverse splits that occur after the balance sheet date of the latest reporting period but before the issuance of the financial statements.

role.label: Earnings Per Share [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for earnings per share.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Adjustments for Accounting Standards Update, Percent
role.documentation: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Adjustments for Accounting Standards Update, Percent

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, at Federal Statutory Income Tax Rate, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of domestic federal statutory tax rate applicable to pretax income (loss).

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Deduction, Other, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to other deductions.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, FDII, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of reported income tax benefit from difference to income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying domestic federal statutory income tax rate to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations, attributable to foreign-derived intangible income (FDII).

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Foreign Income Tax Rate Differential, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations applicable to statutory income tax expense (benefit) outside of the country of domicile.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Nondeductible Expense, Restructuring Charges, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to restructuring charges.

role.terseLabel: State tax on commercial operations, net of federal benefits
role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, State and Local Income Taxes, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations applicable to state and local income tax expense (benefit), net of federal tax expense (benefit).

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to tax credits. Including, but not limited to, research credit, foreign tax credit, investment tax credit, and other tax credits.

role.label: Employee-related Liabilities, Current
role.documentation: Total of the carrying values as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred through that date and payable for obligations related to services received from employees, such as accrued salaries and bonuses, payroll taxes and fringe benefits. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

role.verboseLabel: Unrecognized compensation cost related to stock options
role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement, Nonvested Award, Cost Not yet Recognized, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of cost not yet recognized for nonvested award under share-based payment arrangement.

role.verboseLabel: Recognition period for unrecognized compensation cost
role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement, Nonvested Award, Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition
role.documentation: Weighted-average period over which cost not yet recognized is expected to be recognized for award under share-based payment arrangement, in 'PnYnMnDTnHnMnS' format, for example, 'P1Y5M13D' represents reported fact of one year, five months, and thirteen days.

role.label: Employee Stock Option [Member]
role.documentation: Share-based payment arrangement granting right, subject to vesting and other restrictions, to purchase or sell certain number of shares at predetermined price for specified period of time.

role.label: Engineering and Other Services [Member]
role.documentation: Engineering and Other Services [Member]

role.label: Entity Address, Address Line One
role.documentation: Address Line 1 such as Attn, Building Name, Street Name

role.label: Entity Address, City or Town
role.documentation: Name of the City or Town

role.label: Entity Address, Postal Zip Code
role.documentation: Code for the postal or zip code

role.label: Entity Address, State or Province
role.documentation: Name of the state or province.

role.label: Entity Central Index Key
role.documentation: A unique 10-digit SEC-issued value to identify entities that have filed disclosures with the SEC. It is commonly abbreviated as CIK.

role.label: Entity Common Stock, Shares Outstanding
role.documentation: Indicate number of shares or other units outstanding of each of registrant's classes of capital or common stock or other ownership interests, if and as stated on cover of related periodic report. Where multiple classes or units exist define each class/interest by adding class of stock items such as Common Class A [Member], Common Class B [Member] or Partnership Interest [Member] onto the Instrument [Domain] of the Entity Listings, Instrument.

role.label: Entity Current Reporting Status
role.documentation: Indicate 'Yes' or 'No' whether registrants (1) have filed all reports required to be filed by Section 13 or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 during the preceding 12 months (or for such shorter period that registrants were required to file such reports), and (2) have been subject to such filing requirements for the past 90 days. This information should be based on the registrant's current or most recent filing containing the related disclosure.

role.label: Entity Emerging Growth Company
role.documentation: Indicate if registrant meets the emerging growth company criteria.

role.label: Entity File Number
role.documentation: Commission file number. The field allows up to 17 characters. The prefix may contain 1-3 digits, the sequence number may contain 1-8 digits, the optional suffix may contain 1-4 characters, and the fields are separated with a hyphen.

role.label: Entity Filer Category
role.documentation: Indicate whether the registrant is one of the following: Large Accelerated Filer, Accelerated Filer, Non-accelerated Filer. Definitions of these categories are stated in Rule 12b-2 of the Exchange Act. This information should be based on the registrant's current or most recent filing containing the related disclosure.

role.terseLabel: Entity Incorporation, State or Country Code
role.label: Entity Incorporation, State or Country Code
role.documentation: Two-character EDGAR code representing the state or country of incorporation.

role.label: Entity Interactive Data Current
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true when the registrant has submitted electronically every Interactive Data File required to be submitted pursuant to Rule 405 of Regulation S-T during the preceding 12 months (or for such shorter period that the registrant was required to submit such files).

role.label: Entity Public Float
role.documentation: The aggregate market value of the voting and non-voting common equity held by non-affiliates computed by reference to the price at which the common equity was last sold, or the average bid and asked price of such common equity, as of the last business day of the registrant's most recently completed second fiscal quarter.

role.label: Entity Registrant Name
role.documentation: The exact name of the entity filing the report as specified in its charter, which is required by forms filed with the SEC.

role.label: Entity Shell Company
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true when the registrant is a shell company as defined in Rule 12b-2 of the Exchange Act.

role.label: Entity Small Business
role.documentation: Indicates that the company is a Smaller Reporting Company (SRC).

role.label: Entity Tax Identification Number
role.documentation: The Tax Identification Number (TIN), also known as an Employer Identification Number (EIN), is a unique 9-digit value assigned by the IRS.

role.label: Entity Voluntary Filers
role.documentation: Indicate 'Yes' or 'No' if the registrant is not required to file reports pursuant to Section 13 or Section 15(d) of the Act.

role.label: Entity Well-known Seasoned Issuer
role.documentation: Indicate 'Yes' or 'No' if the registrant is a well-known seasoned issuer, as defined in Rule 405 of the Securities Act. Is used on Form Type: 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, 20-F, 6-K, 10-K/A, 10-Q/A, 20-F/A, 6-K/A, N-CSR, N-Q, N-1A.

role.terseLabel: Long-lived assets of non-U.S. operations percent of total
role.label: Entity Wide Disclosure On Geographic Areas Long Lived Assets In Individual Foreign Countries Percentage
role.documentation: Entity Wide Disclosure On Geographic Areas Long Lived Assets In Individual Foreign Countries Percentage

role.label: Revenue from External Customer [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Revenue, Major Customer [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Equity Component [Domain]
role.documentation: Components of equity are the parts of the total Equity balance including that which is allocated to common, preferred, treasury stock, retained earnings, etc.

role.label: Equity Funds [Member]
role.documentation: An investment that pools funds from many investors to invest in a combination of underlying investments, primarily equity investments.

role.label: Equity Securities without Readily Determinable Fair Value, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of investment in equity security without readily determinable fair value.

role.label: Equity Valuation Assumption Difference, Footnote [Text Block]
Estimate of Fair Value Measurement [Member]
role.documentation: Measured as an estimate of fair value.

role.terseLabel: Fair Value, Balance Sheet Grouping, Financial Statement Captions [Line Items]
role.label: Fair Value, Balance Sheet Grouping, Financial Statement Captions [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.terseLabel: Fair Value, by Balance Sheet Grouping [Table]
role.label: Fair Value, by Balance Sheet Grouping [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about the fair value of financial instruments, including financial assets and financial liabilities, and the measurements of those instruments, assets, and liabilities.

role.terseLabel: Schedule of Carrying And Fair Values Of Other Financial Assets And Liabilities
role.label: Fair Value, by Balance Sheet Grouping [Table Text Block]
role.documentation: Tabular disclosure of the fair value of financial instruments, including financial assets and financial liabilities, and the measurements of those instruments, assets, and liabilities.

role.label: Fair Value Hierarchy and NAV [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by level within fair value hierarchy and fair value measured at net asset value per share as practical expedient.

role.label: Measurement Basis [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by measurement basis.

role.label: Fair Value Measurement [Domain]
role.documentation: Measurement basis, for example, but not limited to, reported value, fair value, portion at fair value, portion at other than fair value.

role.label: Fair Value Disclosures [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for the fair value of financial instruments (as defined), including financial assets and financial liabilities (collectively, as defined), and the measurements of those instruments as well as disclosures related to the fair value of non-financial assets and liabilities. Such disclosures about the financial instruments, assets, and liabilities would include: (1) the fair value of the required items together with their carrying amounts (as appropriate); (2) for items for which it is not practicable to estimate fair value, disclosure would include: (a) information pertinent to estimating fair value (including, carrying amount, effective interest rate, and maturity, and (b) the reasons why it is not practicable to estimate fair value; (3) significant concentrations of credit risk including: (a) information about the activity, region, or economic characteristics identifying a concentration, (b) the maximum amount of loss the entity is exposed to based on the gross fair value of the related item, (c) policy for requiring collateral or other security and information as to accessing such collateral or security, and (d) the nature and brief description of such collateral or security; (4) quantitative information about market risks and how such risks are managed; (5) for items measured on both a recurring and nonrecurring basis information regarding the inputs used to develop the fair value measurement; and (6) for items presented in the financial statement for which fair value measurement is elected: (a) information necessary to understand the reasons for the election, (b) discussion of the effect of fair value changes on earnings, (c) a description of [similar groups] items for which the election is made and the relation thereof to the balance sheet, the aggregate carrying value of items included in the balance sheet that are not eligible for the election; (7) all other required (as defined) and desired information.

role.label: Fair Value Hedge Assets
role.documentation: Fair value of all derivative assets designated as fair value hedging instruments.

role.label: Fair Value Hedge Liabilities
role.documentation: Fair value of all derivative liabilities designated as fair value hedging instruments.

role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 [Member]
role.documentation: Fair value measurement input including quoted price in active market for identical asset or liability reporting entity can access at measurement date (level 1), input other than quoted price included within level 1 either directly or indirectly observable for asset or liability (level 2) and unobservable input reflecting entity's own assumption (level 3).

role.terseLabel: Quoted Prices in Active Markets for Identical Assets (Level 1)
role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 1 [Member]
role.documentation: Quoted prices in active markets for identical assets or liabilities that the reporting entity can access at the measurement date.

role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 2 [Member]
role.documentation: Inputs other than quoted prices included within level 1 that are observable for an asset or liability, either directly or indirectly, including, but not limited to, quoted prices for similar assets or liabilities in active markets, or quoted prices for identical or similar assets or liabilities in inactive markets.

role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 3 [Member]
role.documentation: Unobservable inputs that reflect the entity's own assumption about the assumptions market participants would use in pricing.

role.label: Fair Value, Investments, Entities that Calculate Net Asset Value Per Share, Investment Redemption, Notice Period
role.documentation: Notice period the entity is required to deliver before it can redeem an investment calculated using net asset value per share, in 'PnYnMnDTnHnMnS' format, for example, 'P1Y5M13D' represents the reported fact of one year, five months, and thirteen days. Includes, but is not limited to, investments calculated by per unit, per membership interest, other equity or ownership interest and alternative investments.

role.terseLabel: Plan assets measured using NAV as a practical expedient
role.label: Fair Value Measured at Net Asset Value Per Share [Member]
role.documentation: Fair value measured at net asset value per share as practical expedient.

role.label: Fair Value Measurement, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for fair value measurements of financial and non-financial assets, liabilities and instruments classified in shareholders' equity. Disclosures include, but are not limited to, how an entity that manages a group of financial assets and liabilities on the basis of its net exposure measures the fair value of those assets and liabilities.

role.verboseLabel: Fair Value, Measurements, Fair Value Hierarchy [Domain]
role.label: Fair Value Hierarchy and NAV [Domain]
role.documentation: Categories used to prioritize the inputs to valuation techniques to measure fair value.

role.label: Finance Lease, Interest Expense
role.documentation: Amount of interest expense on finance lease liability.

role.terseLabel: Operating cash flows from finance leases
role.label: Finance Lease, Interest Payment on Liability
role.documentation: Amount of interest paid on finance lease liability.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Fiscal Year Maturity [Abstract]

role.totalLabel: Present value of future lease payments
role.label: Finance Lease, Liability
role.documentation: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease.

role.terseLabel: Less current portion of lease liabilities
role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Current
role.documentation: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as current.

role.terseLabel: Finance Lease, Liability, Current, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible List]
role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Current, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible Enumeration]
role.documentation: Indicates line item in statement of financial position that includes current finance lease liability.

role.terseLabel: Schedule of Reconciliation of Future Undiscounted Cash Flows to the Finance Leases
role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Maturity [Table Text Block]
role.documentation: Tabular disclosure of undiscounted cash flows of finance lease liability. Includes, but is not limited to, reconciliation of undiscounted cash flows to finance lease liability recognized in statement of financial position.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Noncurrent
role.documentation: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as noncurrent.

role.terseLabel: Finance Lease, Liability, Noncurrent, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible List]
role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Noncurrent, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible Enumeration]
role.documentation: Indicates line item in statement of financial position that includes noncurrent finance lease liability.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, after Rolling Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease, due after fifth rolling twelve months following latest statement of financial position date. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on rolling approach, from latest statement of financial position date.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Rolling Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease, due in fifth rolling twelve months following latest statement of financial position date. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on rolling approach, from latest statement of financial position date.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Rolling Year Four
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease, due in fourth rolling twelve months following latest statement of financial position date. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on rolling approach, from latest statement of financial position date.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Rolling Year Three
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease, due in third rolling twelve months following latest statement of financial position date. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on rolling approach, from latest statement of financial position date.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Rolling Year Two
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease, due in second rolling twelve months following latest statement of financial position date. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on rolling approach, from latest statement of financial position date.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Year One
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for finance lease to be paid in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Undiscounted Excess Amount
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments in excess of discounted obligation for lease payments for finance lease.

role.terseLabel: Financing cash flows from finance leases
role.label: Finance Lease, Principal Payments
role.documentation: Amount of cash outflow for principal payment on finance lease.

role.label: Finance Lease, Right-of-Use Asset, after Accumulated Amortization
role.documentation: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of right-of-use asset from finance lease.

role.label: Finance Lease, Right-of-Use Asset, Amortization

role.terseLabel: Finance Lease, Right-of-Use Asset, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible Enumeration]

role.documentation: Weighted average remaining lease term for finance lease, in 'PnYnMnDTnHnMnS' format, for example, 'P1Y5M13D' represents reported fact of one year, five months, and thirteen days.

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Accumulated Amortization
role.documentation: Accumulated amount of amortization of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year One
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Four
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Three
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Two
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Income Tax Contingency [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Income Tax Contingency [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about tax positions taken in the tax returns filed or to be filed for which it is more likely than not that the tax position will not be sustained upon examination by taxing authorities and other income tax contingencies. Includes, but is not limited to, interest and penalties, reconciliation of unrecognized tax benefits, unrecognized tax benefits that would affect the effective tax rate, tax years that remain subject to examination by tax jurisdictions, and information about positions for which it is reasonably possible that amounts unrecognized will significantly change within 12 months.

role.label: Income Tax Disclosure [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for income taxes. Disclosures may include net deferred tax liability or asset recognized in an enterprise's statement of financial position, net change during the year in the total valuation allowance, approximate tax effect of each type of temporary difference and carryforward that gives rise to a significant portion of deferred tax liabilities and deferred tax assets, utilization of a tax carryback, and tax uncertainties information.

role.label: Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

role.label: Income Tax, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for income taxes, which may include its accounting policies for recognizing and measuring deferred tax assets and liabilities and related valuation allowances, recognizing investment tax credits, operating loss carryforwards, tax credit carryforwards, and other carryforwards, methodologies for determining its effective income tax rate and the characterization of interest and penalties in the financial statements.

role.label: Income Tax Uncertainties, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for tax positions taken in the tax return filed or to be filed for which it is more likely than not that the tax position will not be sustained upon examination by taxing authorities and other types of contingencies related to income taxes.

role.label: Income Taxes Paid, Net
role.documentation: The amount of cash paid during the current period to foreign, federal, state, and local authorities as taxes on income, net of any cash received during the current period as refunds for the overpayment of taxes.

role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Accounts Payable
role.documentation: The increase (decrease) during the reporting period in the aggregate amount of liabilities incurred (and for which invoices have typically been received) and payable to vendors for goods and services received that are used in an entity's business.

role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Accounts Receivable
role.documentation: The increase (decrease) during the reporting period in amount due within one year (or one business cycle) from customers for the credit sale of goods and services.

role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Income Taxes Payable
role.documentation: The increase (decrease) during the period in the amount due for taxes based on the reporting entity's earnings or attributable to the entity's income earning process (business presence) within a given jurisdiction.

role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Contract with Customer, Asset
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in right to consideration in exchange for good or service transferred to customer when right is conditioned on something other than passage of time.

role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Contract with Customer, Liability
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable.

role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Inventories
role.documentation: The increase (decrease) during the reporting period in the aggregate value of all inventory held by the reporting entity, associated with underlying transactions that are classified as operating activities.

role.terseLabel: (Increase) decrease in assets, net of effects of business acquisitions:
role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Operating Assets [Abstract]

role.terseLabel: Increase (decrease) in liabilities, net of effects of business acquisitions:
role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Operating Liabilities [Abstract]
Increase (Decrease) in Other Operating Assets and Liabilities, Net
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in operating assets after deduction of operating liabilities classified as other.

role.label: Increase (Decrease) in Stockholders' Equity [Roll Forward]
role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.

role.terseLabel: Dilutive effect of stock options and restricted stock/RSUs (shares)
role.label: Incremental Common Shares Attributable to Dilutive Effect of Share-Based Payment Arrangements
role.documentation: Additional shares included in the calculation of diluted EPS as a result of the potentially dilutive effect of share based payment arrangements using the treasury stock method.

role.documentation: Information Technology Services [Member]

role.label: Interest Expense
role.documentation: Amount of the cost of borrowed funds accounted for as interest expense.

role.label: Interest Income (Expense), Net
role.documentation: The net amount of operating interest income (expense).

role.label: Interest Paid, Including Capitalized Interest, Operating and Investing Activities
role.documentation: Amount of cash paid for interest, including, but not limited to, capitalized interest and payment to settle zero-coupon bond attributable to accreted interest of debt discount and debt instrument with insignificant coupon interest rate in relation to effective interest rate of borrowing attributable to accreted interest of debt discount; classified as operating and investing activities.

role.label: Inventory Disclosure [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for inventory. Includes, but is not limited to, the basis of stating inventory, the method of determining inventory cost, the classes of inventory, and the nature of the cost elements included in inventory.

role.label: Inventory, Finished Goods, Net of Reserves
role.documentation: Carrying amount, net of valuation reserves and adjustments, as of the balance sheet date of merchandise or goods held by the company that are readily available for sale.

role.label: Inventory for Long-Term Contracts or Programs, General and Administrative Costs Included in Inventory
role.documentation: The actual or estimated amount of general and administrative expense remaining in inventory as of the balance sheet date.

role.label: Inventory, Net
role.documentation: Amount after valuation and LIFO reserves of inventory expected to be sold, or consumed within one year or operating cycle, if longer.

role.label: Inventory, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of inventory accounting policy for inventory classes, including, but not limited to, basis for determining inventory amounts, methods by which amounts are added and removed from inventory classes, loss recognition on impairment of inventories, and situations in which inventories are stated above cost.

role.label: Inventory Pre Owned Aircraft
role.documentation: Carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of pre-owned aircraft held by the company for sale.

role.label: Inventory, Raw Materials, Net of Reserves
role.documentation: Carrying amount, net of valuation reserves and adjustments, as of the balance sheet date of unprocessed items to be consumed in the manufacturing or production process.

role.label: Inventory, Work in Process, Net of Reserves
role.documentation: Carrying amount, net of reserves and adjustments, as of the balance sheet date of merchandise or goods which are partially completed. This inventory is generally comprised of raw materials, labor and factory overhead costs, which require further materials, labor and overhead to be converted into finished goods, and which generally require the use of estimates to determine percentage complete and pricing.

role.label: Investment Income, Net
role.documentation: Amount after accretion (amortization) of discount (premium), and investment expense, of interest income and dividend income on nonoperating securities.

role.terseLabel: Investment of U.S. government accounts receivable in the CCF
role.label: Investment Of US Government Accounts Receivable In The CCF
role.documentation: Investment Of US Government Accounts Receivable In The CCF

role.label: Land Improvements
role.documentation: Amount before accumulated depreciation and depletion of additions or improvements to real estate held for productive use. Examples include, but are not limited to, walkways, driveways, fences, and parking lots.

role.label: Large International Customer [Member]
role.documentation: Large International Customer

role.label: Lessee, Lease, Description [Line Items]

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, to be Paid
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for operating lease.

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, to be Paid, after Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for operating lease due after fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Year One
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for operating lease to be paid in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for operating lease to be paid in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Year Four
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for operating lease to be paid in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Year Three
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for operating lease to be paid in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, to be Paid, Year Two
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payment for operating lease to be paid in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Lessee, Operating Lease, Liability, Undiscounted Excess Amount
role.documentation: Amount of lessee's undiscounted obligation for lease payments in excess of discounted obligation for lease payments for operating lease.

role.label: Lessee, Operating Leases [Text Block]

role.label: Liabilities and Equity
role.documentation: Amount of liabilities and equity items, including the portion of equity attributable to noncontrolling interests, if any.

role.label: Liabilities, Current
role.documentation: Total obligations incurred as part of normal operations that are expected to be paid during the following twelve months or within one business cycle, if longer.

role.label: Liabilities, Noncurrent
role.documentation: Amount of obligation due after one year or beyond the normal operating cycle, if longer.

role.label: Line of Credit Facility, Maximum Borrowing Capacity
role.documentation: Maximum borrowing capacity under the credit facility without consideration of any current restrictions on the amount that could be borrowed or the amounts currently outstanding under the facility.

role.label: Loans Payable [Member]
role.documentation: Borrowing supported by a written promise to pay an obligation.
